description: South of 65°N, the resolution of the model is 1° along the zonal direction. In the meridional direction the grid spacing is nominally 1° resolution, with the following three refinements: a) tripolar Arctic north of 65°N (poles at 65°N, 80°E and 65°N, 260°E); b) equatorial refinement to 1/3° between 10°S and 10°N; and c) a Mercator (cosine-dependent) implementation for the southern hemisphere, ranging from 0.25° at 78°S to 1° at 30°S.
